emergencyProcedures.title: Loss of Directional Control
steps: Gear and flaps - DO NOT REPOSITION
Refer to procedure for blown tire(s) or NWS / NWS AUG caution light

emergencyProcedures.title: Fuel Leak / Excessive Fuel Flow
steps: Throttle - AS REQUIRED (maintain a minimum of 70 percent N2)

emergencyProcedures.title: Vibrations
steps: Altitude - DESCEND BELOW 10,000 FEET IF POSSIBLE
AIR FLOW knob - NORMAL / AS DESIRED
Request inspection by other aircraft, if practical

emergencyProcedures.title: Electrical Fire
steps: Proceed to VMC as soon as possible
Plan a no-flap approach and arrested landing, if available

emergencyProcedures.title: Smoke or Fumes in Cockpit
steps: Initiate controlled descent to below 18,000 feet MSL
AIR FLOW knob - OFF (below 18,000 feet MSL if possible)
Warn other cockpit occupant / secure loose items

emergencyProcedures.title: Rapid Decompression
steps: Remain on emergency oxygen until depleted and then resume OBOGS operation until engine shutdown

emergencyProcedures.title: Total Electrical Failure
steps: Proceed to VMC as soon as possible
Attempt to reset generator / check BATT switches - ON
Make a short field arrestment if available

limits.label: Solo Flying
limits.value: Solo flying shall be conducted only from the forward cockpit.

limits.label: Icing
limits.value: Flight in known icing conditions shall be avoided. When airframe icing is visible, intentional stalls or use of full flaps is not authorized.

limits.label: Engine Handling Limits
limits.value: Throttle shall be at idle for abrupt pulls to full back stick, abrupt full lateral stick inputs at full back stick, and airspeeds less than 85 KIAS above 15,000 feet MSL.

limits.label: Engine Operating Limits
limits.value: MRT: 104 percent N2 / 610 C for 30 minutes per flight hour. Transient: 106 percent N2 / 645 C for less than 20 seconds. Maximum continuous: 100 percent N2 / 550 C. Idle: 56.5 +/- 2 percent N2 / 450 C.

limits.label: GTS Start Limits
limits.value: GTS start with external power is prohibited. Minimum interval between each GTS start attempt is 3 minutes. After three consecutive starts, wait 30 minutes before any further start attempts.

limits.label: Fuel Temperature Limits
limits.value: For A++(F-24), Jet A, and A++100 (F-27), do not allow indicated TAT to dwell at or below the fuel freeze point plus 3 C. Operation is restricted to ambient temperatures above 0 C when using fuel without FSII.

limits.label: System Airspeed Limits
limits.value: Landing gear transition / extended: 200 KIAS or less. Flaps / slats transition / extended: 200 KIAS or less. Arresting hook transition / extended: 450 KIAS or less.

limits.label: Canopy and Deck Limits
limits.value: Canopy full open for taxi: prevailing wind 20 knots or less. Stationary or towing with canopy full open: prevailing wind 32 knots or less. Tires and nosewheel steering on deck: 176 knots groundspeed or less.

limits.label: Hot Refueling
limits.value: Hot refueling fuel level must be 2,800 pounds or less if PRECHECK is unsuccessful.

limits.label: Crosswind Limits
limits.value: Single aircraft dry runway 20 knots, wet runway 15 knots, section takeoff 10 knots, banner tow 10 knots, NWS off / failed 15 knots.

limits.label: High Gain Nosewheel Steering
limits.value: High gain nosewheel steering shall be used for low speed taxi operations only, less than 10 knots groundspeed.

limits.label: FCLP Landing Configurations
limits.value: FCLP landings are authorized only with clean loading and full flaps, or pylons alone / pylons with empty PMBRs or BRU-38A and full flaps.

limits.label: Landing Sink Rate
limits.value: For landings in a configuration other than authorized FCLP configurations, sink rate shall not exceed 600 feet per minute.

limits.label: Banner Tow Limits
limits.value: Maximum altitude 20,000 feet MSL. Maximum airspeed 220 KIAS. Maximum bank angle 45 degrees. Maximum AOA 18 units.

limits.label: Banner Release Limits
limits.value: Minimum banner release altitude 500 feet AGL. Banner release airspeed 140 to 200 KIAS. For release between 140 and 150 KIAS, use one-half flaps.

limits.label: Prohibited Maneuvers
limits.value: Intentional spins or tailslides are prohibited. Sustained zero or negative G flight for more than 30 seconds is prohibited.
